current_milestone: M3_Production_Capable_CLOSED (P7 ✓ + P8 ✓). M4 — Presentable not started; P9 is the next phase. P10 (content authoring) is now unlocked but follows P9 in the DAG.
completed_since_last_snapshot: SEAMLESS MODULAR TILE SYSTEM + ART-DEVIATION FIX on the reference kit (dm-0079 mandate, dm-0080 realization; still pre-P9, no game code). User flagged (a) visible seams/cracks between blocks and (b) the terrain had drifted from the committed art direction into a noisy/grainy/thick torn frame instead of the clean solid Limbo/GRIS black masses. Fix: (1) new PaperTiles modular autotile kit -- every tile is a T-by-T cell with an identical square collision box; only exposed surfaces drawn; exposed-edge irregularity tapers to 0 at shared corners and erodes INWARD only so tiles never gap/overhang; terrain autotiles by 4-neighbour mask (out-of-bounds=solid -> map outer frame flush, only play-area-facing edges torn) and composes by painting polygons DIRECTLY into one bitmap (no per-tile drawImage seam). Full named kit: center/edges/4 corners/isolated/platform-ends(l,mid,r)/wall-pieces(t,mid,b). (2) CLEAN-SOLID: removed ALL interior wear/grain from blockSlab and terrain -- solid masses are clean ink, only the exposed silhouette is torn; wear/grain remain on decor + the single shared background layer. Replaced the prior dm-0079 tornBite/1px-bleed terrain (which caused the speckly black). Added a TERRAIN TILE SYSTEM showcase to the asset library sheet. VERIFIED headlessly (tile-geometry invariants: deterministic, exact corner points on every tile, no overhang, flush internal edges, perfect-square center, 16 distinct masks) AND subsequently pixel-accurate in-browser (served over localhost; file:// is sandbox-blocked): sampled 1926 pixels deep inside the bottom terrain band -- 0 transparent specks, 0 off-color pixels (pure clean ink); sampled the internal seam between two adjacent solid tiles -- 0 transparent pixels at the boundary (no crack); sampled the exposed top edge of that same row -- 0-2px variance confirming the torn silhouette is present only on exposed edges. Full-level screenshot confirms the terrain frame now reads as one continuous clean-solid cut-paper mass matching the target reference (Limbo/GRIS style), gameplay silhouettes crisp on top. Zero console errors. Canon synced: visual_design_bible.md (principle 6 clean-solid + rewritten seamless section) + visual-design-principle skill (stale bleed/wear bullet removed) + PKG render/paper_style_pack note. Ledger 78 -> 80 (dm-0079 seamless mandate + dm-0080 tile system). pkg_hash unchanged (s9-a1c0f3). Suite 560 green.

STRUCTURAL CONSISTENCY REFACTOR of the reference kit (dm-0078; still pre-P9, no game code). Fixed the reported laser·on vs laser·off inconsistency and generalized it: (1) KindDraw entries are now {base, overlay} and drawEntity() seeds the BASE from the KIND ALONE (state-independent) + overlay from kind+state, so every entity's base geometry/silhouette/proportions are byte-identical across states and only functional overlays (indicators/beams/accents/moving parts) change; (2) added a shared PaperBlocks 9-slice block library (top-left..center..bottom-right + all) from one blockSlab() generator (outer edges torn, inner edges flush -> seamless linear floors/walls/platforms); inkBlock is now a thin all-edges alias; tileRun + every block-based base (platform/laser/door/conveyor/pressurePlate/spring/collapsingFloor/ice) draw through it -> single source of truth for structural geometry. VERIFIED in-browser: laser base pixel-diff outside the aperture indicator = 0 (only the indicator differs); 9-slice variants present; all 12 kinds render, zero exceptions. Canon synced: visual_design_bible.md (principle 9 + block-library section) + visual-design-principle skill + PKG render/paper_style_pack note. Ledger 77 -> 78 (dm-0078). pkg_hash unchanged (s9-a1c0f3). Suite 560 green.

PAPER COLLAGE SIMPLIFICATION PASS on the reference kit (dm-0077; still pre-P9, no game code). Refined src/assets/paper-asset-library.html ~40% for readability-first while preserving the architecture (procedural-at-load, cached canvases, merged tile runs, one composed background, seeded determinism, drawImage-only runtime): per-asset grain -> single shared background grain layer (sprites now clean bold ink); decor 16 -> 8 types; jitter/subdivision reduced (roughPoly seg9->14/j1.5->1.0, roughLine 8->12px, inkBlock j2->1.4); conveyor caches ONE body with direction via the live chevron sweep (dropped the left/right cache split + duplicate baked chevrons); tile-run variants 3->2; decor composited low-contrast (DECOR_ALPHA .62). VERIFIED in-browser (served over localhost; 8 decor keys, 12 entity kinds intact, canvas paints, zero exceptions). Canon synced: visual_design_bible.md + visual-design-principle skill (single-shared-grain, ~8 decor, cache-only-meaningful-states, calm jitter) + PKG render/paper_style_pack node note.
